subject:
done - california lawmakers eye billing businesses for edison

emails.subject:
Re: DONE - California Lawmakers Eye Billing Businesses for Edison
 Rescue
emails.subject_base:
DONE - California Lawmakers Eye Billing Businesses for Edison
 Rescue
emails.body: Re: DONE California Lawmakers Eye Billing Businesses for Edison Rescue I spoke to Jason. Told him we had been advocating a core/non-core solution similar to natural gas market. He said he had it from other sources that we sent a four page recommendation to the "speaker." I told him I didn't know how many pages or to whom, but that we had submitted some ideas. His questions were in response to calls after stories appeared yesterday. Did I kill our chances? Mark
